title: paraboea neurophylla
intro: Paraboea neurophylla is a species of plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the neurophylla paraboea or the mountain paraboea. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Himalayas and surrounding areas. The medicinal properties of Paraboea neurophylla are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Paraboea neurophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin infections.
